title: asplenium fontanum
intro: Asplenium fontanum, also known as the ivy spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Asplenium fontanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Asplenium fontanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried, although further research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
